name: Aero-Guard Unit
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Aerial Patrol) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 1/2 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, if ~ has flying, energize.
flavor_text: Eyes on the horizon, sensors on high alert; the patrol never sleeps.
design_notes: Designed for the WU Skyline Patrol archetype. This card provides tactical flexibility via Alt-Mode, allowing a ground-based soldier to become an evasive flyer. As a rare, it provides engine value by using the 'energize' keyword action upon attacking in its aerial form, helping fuel the deck's artifact and resource themes. The mana cost reflects its dual-color identity which is necessary to fully participate in the WU archetype's synergy with blue interaction and white protection/soldiers.
